$comment: TAG-64 — golden snapshot of the SSE event SHAPE produced by /solve_v2
for a single-turn 'what is 2+2?' request with the FakeLLMClient running
a minimal finalize-only script (planner emits one STREAM_ING + one
ANSWER_ING + the END frame). The snapshot intentionally captures the
(type, state) tuple per frame — NOT the full content payload — so
planner reword tweaks don't churn this file. Re-record only when the
Encoding: each entry is 'type:state' produced by event_types() in
conftest.py. The first frame is always a STREAM_ING planner kick-off
and the last frame is always 'planner:END'.
